sourceTitle: Acceptable Use of Generative AI Tools | UT Austin Information Security Office
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Public or Published Data: Data that is publicly available or classified as Published university information ... may be used freely with AI tools. Controlled or Confidential Data ... can be used with AI tools that are managed by the university and covered by contracts explicitly protecting university data ... and web search functionality must be disabled.
